AppliedClaimOwnershipProof.description: Outcome-gated durable ownership; never publication or action authority.
AppliedClaimOwnershipProof.title: AppliedClaimOwnershipProof

AuthorityEvidence.description: Authenticated evidence for authority that already exists outside this evaluator.
AuthorityEvidence.title: AuthorityEvidence

BoundExecutionCall.description: Current call carrier for either prospective publication or applied ownership.
BoundExecutionCall.title: BoundExecutionCall

ClaimPublicationArtifact.description: One exact postimage produced by an applied claim publication.
ClaimPublicationArtifact.title: ClaimPublicationArtifact

ClaimPublicationCompletionEvidence.description: Stable evidence that one exact admitted claim publication completed.
ClaimPublicationCompletionEvidence.title: ClaimPublicationCompletionEvidence

ContentAddress.description: An exact external object reference and its content hash.
ContentAddress.title: ContentAddress

CurrentClaimLeaseFile.description: One exact current claim sidecar observed in a sealed lease vector.
CurrentClaimLeaseFile.title: CurrentClaimLeaseFile

CurrentClaimPosition.description: Current task/lease position bound to outcome-gated ownership, never authority.
CurrentClaimPosition.title: CurrentClaimPosition

EffectManifest.description: Immutable description of the effect and its proof obligations.
EffectManifest.title: EffectManifest

EffectObservation.description: Raw post-invocation facts; this object never decides semantic success.
EffectObservation.title: EffectObservation

ExecutionAdmission.description: Non-authorizing decision evidence for one exact action and position.
ExecutionAdmission.title: ExecutionAdmission

ExecutionCompositionManifest.description: Installed composition identity; integrity alone never authorizes activation.
ExecutionCompositionManifest.title: ExecutionCompositionManifest

ExecutionCompositionPortDescriptors.description: Content identities for every runtime port; these do not install a port.
ExecutionCompositionPortDescriptors.title: ExecutionCompositionPortDescriptors

ExecutionInvocationBundle.description: Immutable admission-time reconstruction carrier for one admitted invocation.
ExecutionInvocationBundle.title: ExecutionInvocationBundle

ExecutionInvocationBundlePointer.description: Path-free address for a bundle in the composition-owned immutable store.
ExecutionInvocationBundlePointer.title: ExecutionInvocationBundlePointer

ExecutionInvocationEnvelope.description: Current content-addressed projection of every active invocation root.
ExecutionInvocationEnvelope.title: ExecutionInvocationEnvelope

ExecutionLease.description: Current short-lived machine lease for one typed claim-basis branch.
ExecutionLease.title: ExecutionLease

ExecutionTrustEnvelope.description: Frontier-bound answer produced by the installed trust projection.
ExecutionTrustEnvelope.title: ExecutionTrustEnvelope

ExecutionTrustQuery.description: Exact, non-authorizing question to the current trust projection.
ExecutionTrustQuery.title: ExecutionTrustQuery

ExecutorDescriptor.description: Static implementation identity, separate from adapter and route identity.
ExecutorDescriptor.title: ExecutorDescriptor

ExecutorRegistryProjection.description: Frontier-bound support projection of exact executor implementations.
ExecutorRegistryProjection.title: ExecutorRegistryProjection

FrontierValidityEnvelope.description: Moving, non-authorizing validity for one immutable projection.
FrontierValidityEnvelope.title: FrontierValidityEnvelope

HistoricalSupportDisposition.description: Authenticity evidence for durable support that is not action-current authority.
HistoricalSupportDisposition.title: HistoricalSupportDisposition

LifecycleCanonImageCarrier.description: Exact canon-image wire carrier; Council retains semantic membership proof.
LifecycleCanonImageCarrier.title: LifecycleCanonImageCarrier

OutcomeProjectionSnapshot.description: Data-only, content-addressed replay of one complete event-plane outcome chain.
OutcomeProjectionSnapshot.title: OutcomeProjectionSnapshot

OutcomeReceipt.description: Canonical closure/open-loop receipt built only after event-plane append.
OutcomeReceipt.title: OutcomeReceipt

OutcomeReplayCatalogSnapshot.description: One immutable read of moving outcome and frontier-validity state.
OutcomeReplayCatalogSnapshot.title: OutcomeReplayCatalogSnapshot

OutcomeReplayResult.description: Query-time selection of one current outcome from one catalog snapshot.
OutcomeReplayResult.title: OutcomeReplayResult

ProspectiveClaimPublicationBasis.description: Path-independent pre-publication facts; evidence only, never authority.
ProspectiveClaimPublicationBasis.title: ProspectiveClaimPublicationBasis

ProspectiveClaimPublicationCarrier.description: Path-free reconstruction bytes for a prospective publication basis.
ProspectiveClaimPublicationCarrier.title: ProspectiveClaimPublicationCarrier

ProtectedActionDecision.description: Non-authorizing evaluation result; success means dispatch, never fallthrough.
ProtectedActionDecision.title: ProtectedActionDecision

ProtectedActionHold.description: Canonical transport HOLD when no complete protected request can be resolved.
ProtectedActionHold.title: ProtectedActionHold

ProtectedActionRequest.description: Self-hashed ingress request whose roots must be consumed by ActionIntent.
ProtectedActionRequest.title: ProtectedActionRequest

ProtectedApertureDecision.description: Pure classification of one exact ingress payload; never an authority grant.
ProtectedApertureDecision.title: ProtectedApertureDecision

ProtectedClaimCoordinates.description: Active coordinates bind exactly one prospective or applied claim basis.
ProtectedClaimCoordinates.title: ProtectedClaimCoordinates

RootDisposition.description: Frontier evidence for one exact root, shared by trust and currentness.
RootDisposition.title: RootDisposition
